use_codes.desc: PREFEST IS INDICATED IN WOMEN WHO HAVE A UTERUS FOR THE TREATMENT OF MODERATE TO SEVERE VASOMOTOR SYMPTOMS ASSOCIATED WITH MENOPAUSE; TREATMENT OF VULVAR AND VAGINAL ATROPHY; PREVENTION OF OSTEOPOROSIS
